title: tanacetum afghanicum
intro: Tanacetum afghanicum, also known as Afghan tansy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as relieving menstrual cramps and reducing fever, and is also used to treat digestive issues and skin irritations. The leaves and flowers of the Afghan tansy plant can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
